creator: andreas.tobler@nexus-ag.com
text:
Hi Justin,

does it work when you build the stuff integrated into the kernel?

IOW, no modules?

I seem to succeed with built-in sound.
This is on a G4 PowerBook:
FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT #2 r208419M: Mon May 24 20:42:05 CEST 2010

andreast@wolfram.andreas.nets:/usr/obj/export/devel/fbsd/src/sys/ANDREAST_p=
pc_pb
powerpc
cpu0: Motorola PowerPC 7447A revision 1.1, 752.40 MHz
cpu0: Features 9c000000<PPC32,ALTIVEC,FPU,MMU>
cpu0: HID0 8450c0bc<EMCP,TBEN,NAP,DPM,ICE,DCE,SGE,BTIC,LRSTK,FOLD,BHT>
real memory  =3D 1060024320 (1010 MB)
avail memory =3D 1023868928 (976 MB)


iichb0: <Keywest I2C controller> mem 0x18000-0x18fff irq 26 on macio0
iichb0: [ITHREAD]
iicbus0: <OFW I2C bus> on iichb0
iic0: <I2C generic I/O> on iicbus0
iicbus0: <unknown card> at addr 0x1c0
snapper0: <Texas Instruments TAS3004 Audio Codec> at addr 0x6a on iicbus0

Andreas
